title: Hooks Config (hooks/hooks.json)
description: Schema modeled on the actual current hooks/hooks.json:2-60 and Codex docs https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build:930-955. The top-level `hooks` value is an OBJECT keyed by event name (SessionStart, PreToolUse, PostToolUse), not a flat array. Each event's value is an array of handler entries; each handler has optional `matcher` (PreToolUse/PostToolUse only) and a nested `hooks` array of `type:command` entries.

SessionStart.description: After commit 13: REPLACED with compact ≤500-token bootstrap (per spec FR-013 / SC-013). One handler entry calling session-start-bootstrap.sh.

PreToolUse.description: After commit 13: existing pre-bash-guard.sh + pre-commit-lint.sh handlers unchanged from feature 018, plus NEW pretooluse-arch-profile.sh handler reading project.yml at fire-time per FR-034.

PostToolUse.description: After commit 13: existing post-edit-format.sh + post-scaffold-restore.sh handlers unchanged from feature 018.

matcher.description: Tool-name matcher (PreToolUse/PostToolUse only). e.g., 'Bash', 'Edit|Write'. Not used for SessionStart entries.

command.description: Path under hooks/ resolved via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}. Codex CLI uses ${PLUGIN_ROOT} as equivalent per developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build:954-955.

if.description: Handler-level filter expression (Claude Code 2.1.85+). e.g., 'Bash(git commit*)', 'Edit(*.cs)'.
